channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: HunxByts /GhostTrack | Python | N/A
item.description: Useful tool to track location or mobile number

item.title: refactoringhq /tolaria | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Desktop app to manage markdown knowledge bases

item.title: RyanCodrai /turbovec | Python | N/A
item.description: A vector index built on TurboQuant, written in Rust with Python bindings

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: aaif-goose /goose | Rust | N/A
item.description: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM

item.title: lfnovo /open-notebook | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An Open Source implementation of Notebook LM with more flexibility and features

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: Leonxlnx /taste-skill | Shell | N/A
item.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

item.title: mvanhorn /last30days-skill | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary
